title: Bootstrap initialization seed (2026-02)
trigger: Workflow-memory coverage bootstrap for fresh repository/month baseline.
finding: Initialization-only seeded event added to satisfy strict coverage baseline. This does not represent an observed workflow run.
followUp: Continue normal workflow execution and append observed events; keep initialization entries only as baseline markers.

feedback: If this command is needed repeatedly, investigate why observed events are not being persisted.

title: ready-for-dev-executor run summary: issues #6 #7 #8
trigger: ready-for-dev triage selected bundled API boundary hardening issues #6 #7 #8 (author=brandonbryant12)
finding: Implemented and merged one PR that extracted runs use-cases, expanded router invariants, and removed API router dependency on db job constants.

reflection: Bundling three tightly related router-boundary issues in one PR remained coherent and passed all required gates.
feedback: Avoid shell interpolation in gh PR body by defaulting to --body-file for multiline markdown.
